input:
Create a brand kit for this product:

Product: LED cloud lamp
Category: home_decor
Price point: $24.99
Trend signals: tiktok_cc: 0.85, reddit: 0.72
Fulfillment: dropship

Generate:
1. "names": array of 3 brand name options (short, memorable, modern)
2. "selected_name": your recommended pick from the 3
3. "colors": array of 2-3 hex colors (primary, accent, optional dark)
4. "typography": {"heading": "font name", "body": "font name"} — Google Fonts only
5. "logo_prompt": a DALL-E/Flux prompt for a minimalist logo
6. "instagram_bio": Instagram bio text (150 chars max, include emoji)
7. "page_description": one-line brand positioning statement

Respond ONLY with valid JSON. No markdown, no explanation.
output:
```
{
  "names": ["Lumia", "Aurora", "Nimbus"],
  "selected_name": "Lumia",
  "colors": ["#87CEEB", "#FFFFFF", "#2F4F7F"],
  "typography": {"heading": "Montserrat", "body": "Lato"},
  "logo_prompt": "a stylized letter L made of gentle clouds and soft light",
  "instagram_bio": "Brighten up your space 🌟 Luxury LED decor @Lumia",
  "page_description": "Elevate your home with modern, affordable LED lighting solutions"
}
```

input:
Write landing page copy for:

Product: LED cloud lamp
Brand: Lumia
Price: $24.99
Approach: benefit

Output JSON:
1. "headline": main headline (max 10 words, powerful)
2. "subheadline": supporting text (max 20 words)
3. "benefits": array of 3-5 benefit bullets (specific, not generic)
4. "cta_text": call-to-action button text
5. "social_proof": fake-but-believable social proof line
6. "urgency_text": urgency element text

Respond ONLY with valid JSON. No markdown, no explanation.
output:
```
{
  "headline": "Ambient Lighting Redefined",
  "subheadline": "Elevate your space with soft glow",
  "benefits": [
    "Improves mood with soothing color palette",
    "Saves energy with LED technology",
    "Creates cozy atmosphere for relaxation"
  ],
  "cta_text": "Get Yours Now",
  "social_proof": "Over 10,000 satisfied customers worldwide",
  "urgency_text": "Limited time offer: only $24.99, normally $39.99"
}
```

instruction: Write a TikTok/Instagram ad hook. Use winning patterns, avoid losing patterns.
input:
Write ad copy for:
Product: LED cloud lamp
Brand: Lumia
Price: $24.99
Hook type: problem_solution
Target: 18-45, impulse buyers, social media scroll-stoppers

Output JSON:
1. "hook": opening line that stops the scroll (max 15 words)
2. "body": supporting copy (2-3 short sentences)
3. "cta": call to action

Respond ONLY with valid JSON. No markdown, no explanation.
output: {"hook": "Tired of boring bedrooms?", "body": "Add ambiance with Lumia's LED cloud lamp. Relaxing glow, affordable price.", "cta": "Get yours now for $24.99!"}

instruction: Write a social media caption for this product post.
input:
Create a 10-day content calendar for:
Product: LED cloud lamp
Brand: Lumia
Price: $24.99

Post types to mix: product_showcase, lifestyle, ugc_style, benefit_focused, urgency_scarcity

Output JSON: {"posts": [{"day": 1, "post_type": "...", "caption": "...", "image_prompt": "..."}]}
Each post needs caption (Instagram-ready with hashtags) and image_prompt (for AI image gen).

Respond ONLY with valid JSON. No markdown, no explanation.
output:
{"posts": [
{"day": 1, "post_type": "product_showcase", "caption": "Meet the Lumia LED cloud lamp! Add a touch of magic to your bedroom with this adorable lamp. #LumiaLamp #CloudLamp #BedroomGoals", "image_prompt": "A Lumia LED cloud lamp on a bedside table with a cozy bedroom background"},
{"day": 2, "post_type": "lifestyle", "caption": "Cozy night in? We've got you covered! Our LED cloud lamp is the perfect companion for a relaxing evening. #LumiaLamp #SelfCare #RelaxationMode", "image_prompt": "A person reading a book in bed with the Lumia LED cloud lamp softly lighting the room"},
{"day": 3, "post_type": "ugc_style", "caption": "Just got my Lumia LED cloud lamp and I'm OBSESSED! It's the perfect addition to my home decor. #LumiaLamp #HomeDecor #CloudLampLove", "image_prompt": "A customer's photo of the Lumia LED cloud lamp in their living room with a personalized touch"},
{"day": 4, "post_type": "benefit_focused", "caption": "Did you know our LED cloud lamp can help improve your mood? The soft, calming light can reduce stress and anxiety. #LumiaLamp #MentalHealth #Wellness", "image_prompt": "An illustration of a brain with a calming light shining on it, surrounded by positive thoughts and emotions"},
{"day": 5, "post_type": "product_showcase", "caption": "Get ready to fall in love with our LED cloud lamp's color-changing feature! #LumiaLamp #ColorChanging #CloudLamp", "image_prompt": "A close-up of the Lumia LED cloud lamp with a color-changing effect"},
{"day": 6, "post_type": "lifestyle", "caption": "Sunday vibes Our LED cloud lamp is the perfect companion for a lazy Sunday morning. #LumiaLamp #SundayFunday #Relaxation", "image_prompt": "A person lounging in bed with the Lumia LED cloud lamp softly lighting the room, surrounded by pillows and blankets"},
{"day": 7, "post_type": "ugc_style", "caption": "We love seeing your Lumia LED cloud lamp photos! Share yours with us and get featured! #LumiaLamp #CustomerLove #CloudLampCommunity", "image_prompt": "A customer's photo of the Lumia LED cloud lamp in their bedroom with a fun and colorful background"},
{"day": 8, "post_type": "benefit_focused", "caption": "Our LED cloud lamp is energy-efficient and eco-friendly! Make the switch to a more sustainable lighting option. #LumiaLamp #EcoFriendly #Sustainability", "image_prompt": "An illustration of a green earth with a Lumia LED cloud lamp shining a light on it, surrounded by leaves and recycling symbols"},
{"day": 9, "post_type": "urgency_scarcity", "caption": "Limited time offer! Get 10% off your Lumia LED cloud lamp purchase with code CLOUD10. Don't miss out! #LumiaLamp #Sale #LimitedTimeOffer", "image_prompt": "A photo of the Lumia LED cloud lamp with a red sale sticker and a countdown timer in the background"},
{"day": 10, "post_type": "urgency_scarcity", "caption": "Last chance to get your Lumia LED cloud lamp at $24.99! Prices will be increasing soon, so don't wait! #LumiaLamp #LastChance #PriceIncrease", "image_prompt": "A photo of the Lumia LED cloud lamp with a warning sign and a clock ticking in the background"}
]}
